title: The National Institute of Mental Health and Neuro-Sciences, Bangalore Act, 2012
full_text: The National Institute of Mental Health and Neuro-Sciences, Bangalore Act, 2012 राष्‍ट्रीय मानसिक स्‍वास्‍थ्‍य और तंत्रिका-विज्ञान संस्‍थान, बंगलौर अधिनियम, 2012 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 201238 Act Number: 38 Enactment Date: 2012-09-13 Act Year: 2012 Short Title: The National Institute of Mental Health and Neuro-Sciences, Bangalore Act, 2012 Hindi Title: राष्‍ट्रीय मानसिक स्‍वास्‍थ्‍य और तंत्रिका-विज्ञान संस्‍थान, बंगलौर अधिनियम, 2012 Long Title: An Act to declare the institution known as the National Institute of Mental Health and NeuroSciences, Bangalore, to be an institution of national importance and to provide for its incorporation and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare Department: Department of Health and Family Welfare Enforcement Date: 29-11-2013 Notification: 29th November, 2013, vide notification No S.O. 3534(E), dated 29th November, 2013 see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The National Institute of Mental Health and Neuro-Sciences, Bangalore Act, 2012 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Declaration of National Institute of Mental Health and Neuro-Sciences, Bangalore, as an institution of national importance. Section 3. Definitions. Section 4. Incorporation of Institute. Section 5. Composition of Institute. Section 6. Term of office of and vacancies among members. Section 7. Powers and functions of President. Section 8. Vice-President of Institute. Section 9. Allowances of President, Vice-President and other members. Section 10. Meetings of Institute. Section 11. Governing Body and other committees of Institute. Section 12. Staff of Institute. Section 13. Objects of Institute. Section 14. Functions of Institute. Section 15. Vesting of property. Section 16. Payment to Institute. Section 17. Fund of Institute. Section 18. Budget of Institute. Section 19. Accounts and audit. Section 20. Annual report. Section 21. Pension and provident funds. Section 22. Authentication of orders and instruments of Institute. Section 23. Acts and proceedings not to be invalidated by vacancies, etc. Section 24. Grant of medical degrees, diplomas, etc., by Institute. Section 25. Recognition of medical qualifications granted by Institute. Section 26. Control by Central Government. Section 27. Resolution of differences. Section 28. Returns and information. Section 29. Transfer of service of existing employees. Section 30. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 31. Power to make regulations. Show Related Subordinates Section 32. Laying of rules and regulations before Parliament. Section 33. Power to remove difficulties.
